CLOUD-COUNTERSTANCE.description:
[gold]Switch Stance[/gold] to [gold]Punisher Mode[/gold]. 
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Blocked damage is reflected back to the attacker for 1 turn.
CLOUD-COUNTERSTANCE.title: Counterstance
CLOUD-BLIZZARA.title: Blizzara
CLOUD-FIRA.title: Fira
CLOUD-THUNDARA.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies [gold]{Repeat:diff()}[/gold] times.
CLOUD-THUNDARA.title: Thundara
CLOUD-FIRE.title: Fire
CLOUD-BLIZZARD.title: Blizzard
CLOUD-THUNDER.title: Thunder
CLOUD-BRAVER.title: Braver
CLOUD-GUARD_BREAK.title: Guard Break
CLOUD-POWER_BREAK.title: Power Break
CLOUD-GUARD_STANCE.title: Guard Stance
CLOUD-LARGE_SWORD_MASTERY.title: Greatsword Mastery
CLOUD-MAKO_MIGHT.title: Mako Exposure
CLOUD-TRIPLE_SLASH.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to random enemies. 
[gold]Operator[/gold]: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage. 
[gold]Punisher[/gold]: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
CLOUD-TRIPLE_SLASH.title: Triple Slash
CLOUD-BRAVER_KAI.title: Braver EX
CLOUD-ASSAULT_CHARGE.title: Assault Charge
CLOUD-QUICK_HIT.title: Swift Slash
CLOUD-WIND_UP_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold]. Switch stance. 
[gold]Punisher[/gold]: Gain 2 additional [gold]Vigor[/gold].
CLOUD-WIND_UP_SLASH.title: Wind-Up Slash
CLOUD-SPINNING_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
CLOUD-SPINNING_SLASH.title: Spinning Slash
CLOUD-CHANGE_THE_TEMPO.title: Change The Tempo
CLOUD-PASSING_THE_TORCH.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of every turn.
CLOUD-PASSING_THE_TORCH.title: Passing The Torch
CLOUD-GOT_YOUR_BACK.title: I Got Your Back!
CLOUD-LIMIT_BREAK.title: Limit Break
CLOUD-TEST_LIMIT_BREAK.title: TestLimitBreak
CLOUD-OMNISLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 15 times. 
Last hit deals [blue]double[/blue] damage.
CLOUD-OMNISLASH.title: Omnislash
CLOUD-CROSS_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. 
The enemy deals [blue]{CrossSlashPower:diff()}%[/blue] less damage for 1 turn.
CLOUD-CROSS_SLASH.title: Cross Slash
CLOUD-AERIAL_DRIVE.title: Aerial Drive
CLOUD-CROSS_SLASH_KAI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. 
The enemy deals [blue]{CrossSlashPower:diff()}%[/blue] less damage for 1 turn.
CLOUD-CROSS_SLASH_KAI.title: Cross Slash EX
CLOUD-PRIME_MODE.title: Prime Mode
CLOUD-PROTECT.title: Protect
CLOUD-HASTE.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Gain 1 ATB and draw 1 additional card at the start of your turn for the next {HastePower:diff()} turns.
CLOUD-HASTE.title: Haste
CLOUD-FINAL_STAND.title: Final Stand
CLOUD-SONIC_IMPACT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
If fatal, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
CLOUD-SONIC_IMPACT.title: Sonic Impact
CLOUD-ELEMENTAL_BOOST.description: Increases damage dealt by magic by [gold]{MagicDamageUpPower:diff()}%[/gold].
CLOUD-ELEMENTAL_BOOST.title: Elemental Boost
CLOUD-RUIN.title: Ruin
CLOUD-RUINRA.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
[gold]Operator[/gold]: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold]. 
[gold]Punisher[/gold]: Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
CLOUD-RUINRA.title: Ruinra
CLOUD-RUINGA.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
[gold]Operator[/gold]: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold]. 
[gold]Punisher[/gold]: Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
CLOUD-RUINGA.title: Ruinga
CLOUD-MANAWARD.title: Manaward
CLOUD-MANAWALL.title: Manawall
CLOUD-BARRIER.title: Barrier
CLOUD-QUICKDRAW.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. 
[gold]Operator[/gold]: If it is a skill or a magic card, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
[gold]Punisher[/gold]: If it is an attack or power card, gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
CLOUD-QUICKDRAW.title: Quickdraw
CLOUD-SOLDIERS_PRIDE.description:
At the start of your turn, if you did not take any damage from the enemy last turn: 
[gold]Operator[/gold]: Gain {SoldiersPridePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
[gold]Punisher[/gold]: Gain {SoldiersPridePower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
CLOUD-SOLDIERS_PRIDE.title: SOLDIER's Pride
CLOUD-SONIC_THRUST.title: Sonic Thrust
CLOUD-RELENTLESS_STRIKE.title: Relentless Strike
CLOUD-CLIMHAZZARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. 
The next attack against that enemy deals [gold]{ArmorBreakPower:diff()}%[/gold] more damage
CLOUD-CLIMHAZZARD.title: Climhazzard
CLOUD-COMBAT_MOMENTUM.description: The first time you switch to [blue]Punisher Mode[/blue] on your turn, draw {CombatMomentumPower:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
CLOUD-COMBAT_MOMENTUM.title: Combat Momentum
CLOUD-OVERCLOCK.title: Overclock
CLOUD-STEADFAST_BLOCK.title: Steadfast Block
CLOUD-TACTICAL_RETREAT.title: Tactical Retreat
CLOUD-METEORAIN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold].
CLOUD-METEORAIN.title: Meteorain
CLOUD-OMNISLASH_VER_FIVE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. 
If you have 50 or more [gold]Limit[/gold], consume 50 [gold]Limit[/gold] and deal 2 additional damage.
CLOUD-OMNISLASH_VER_FIVE.title: Omnislash V5
CLOUD-DISORDER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
[gold]Operator[/gold]: Next attack cost 0 {Energy:energyIcons()}. 
[gold]Punisher[/gold]: Hits twice. If fatal, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
[gold]Switch Stance[/gold].
CLOUD-DISORDER.title: Disorder
CLOUD-ASCENSION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 7 times. 
Last hit deals [blue]double[/blue] damage.
CLOUD-ASCENSION.title: Ascension
CLOUD-FOCUSED_THRUST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 2 times and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies. 
Last hit deals additional damage equal to [blue]{percentHPDamage:diff()}%[/blue] of the target's current HP.
CLOUD-FOCUSED_THRUST.title: Focused Thrust
CLOUD-BLADE_BEAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold].
CLOUD-BLADE_BEAM.title: Blade Beam
CLOUD-FIRAGA.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to 1 enemy. 
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
CLOUD-FIRAGA.title: Firaga
CLOUD-THUNDAGA.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies [gold]{Repeat:diff()}[/gold] times.
CLOUD-THUNDAGA.title: Thundaga
CLOUD-BLIZZAGA.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].

CLOUD-DEFLECT.title: Deflect

CLOUD-AGGRESSION.title: Aggression
CLOUD-JENOVA_CELLS.title: Jenova Cells
CLOUD-ADRENALINE_SURGE.description:
Gain 30 [gold]Limit[/gold]. 
Gain additional 20 [gold]Limit[/gold] if you have [gold]Fury[/gold].
CLOUD-ADRENALINE_SURGE.title: Adrenaline Surge
CLOUD-BACKSTEP.title: Backstep
CLOUD-BUSTER_END.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Costs 1 less {Energy:energyIcons()} for each Attack played this turn.
CLOUD-BUSTER_END.title: Infinity's End
CLOUD-FIRAGA_BURST.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], deal half damage to ALL enemies.
CLOUD-FIRAGA_BURST.title: Firaga Burst
CLOUD-MAGIC_SHIELD.description: Whenever you play [gold]Magic[/gold] this turn, gain {MagicShieldPower:diff()} Block.
CLOUD-MAGIC_SHIELD.title: Magic Shield
CLOUD-MATERIA_THEFT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Discard all [gold]non-magic[/gold] cards drawn this way.
CLOUD-MATERIA_THEFT.title: Materia Theft
CLOUD-ULTIMA.title: Ultima
CLOUD-W_MAGIC.description: The first magic card you play each turn is played an extra time.
CLOUD-W_MAGIC.title: W Magic
CLOUD-THUNDAGA_BURST.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies [gold]{Repeat:diff()}[/gold] times. 
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], hit 2 additional times.
CLOUD-THUNDAGA_BURST.title: Thundaga Burst
CLOUD-BLIZZAGA_BURST.description:
[gold]Magic[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], double block gained.
CLOUD-BLIZZAGA_BURST.title: Blizzaga Burst
CLOUD-IFRIT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} [gold]Magic[/gold] damage. 
The enemy takes [blue]50%[/gold] more [/gold]Magic[/gold] damage for 3 turns.
CLOUD-IFRIT.title: Ifrit
CLOUD-BAHAMUT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
After 3 turns, deal 60 [gold]Magic[/gold] damage to ALL enemies.
CLOUD-BAHAMUT.title: Bahamut
CLOUD-ODIN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Kill the enemy if it has [gold]{hpPercent:diff()}%[/gold] HP or less.
CLOUD-ODIN.title: Odin
CLOUD-SHIVA.title: Shiva
CLOUD-ZANTETSUKEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Kill the enemy if it has [gold]{hpPercent:diff()}%[/gold] HP or less.
CLOUD-ZANTETSUKEN.title: Zantetsuken
CLOUD-RAMUH.title: Ramuh
CLOUD-OMNIBREAK.title: Omnibreak
CLOUD-SIPHON.title: Siphon
CLOUD-INVOKE.description:
Gain {SummonPower:diff()} [gold]Summon[/gold]. 
Double [gold]Summon[/gold] gained from attacks and [gold]Magic[/gold].
CLOUD-INVOKE.title: Invoke
CLOUD-HEROS_LAST_WISH.title: Hero's Last Wish
CLOUD-FORGOTTEN_IDENTITY.title: Forgotten Identity
CLOUD-FALSE_SOLDIER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
If you have 50 or more [gold]Limit[/gold], double [gold]Block[/gold] gained. [gold]Consumes ALL Limit[/gold].
CLOUD-FALSE_SOLDIER.title: False Soldier
CLOUD-LAST_RESORT.description:
[gold]Exhaust your Hand. 
Gain full [gold]Limit[/gold] and 3 [gold]ATB[/gold]. 
You cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards for 2 turns.

CLOUD-MATERIA_BOMB.title: Materia Bomb
